goal.objective: Independently review, verify, and integrate the V11 Specialist Compiler candidate for owner approval.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Candidate construction, scheduling, selection, and digest semantics are deterministic and accurately claimed.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed algorithm and test candidate sources.
Independent algorithm and lifecycle acceptance review.

acceptanceCriteria.description: The V11 product and public API match the owner goal and remain IDE, model, and provider neutral.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed product and API candidate sources.
Independent product and API acceptance review.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Canonical verification and source-linked release evidence are complete before owner approval.

evidenceRequirements.description: Integrated V11 review, memory, and milestone artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Authority, context, privacy, rendering, and trace bindings fail closed.

evidenceRequirements.description: Content-addressed security and trace candidate sources.
Independent security and trace acceptance review.

contextSources.description: The current version, constraints, and release memory.
The candidate construction and blueprint compiler implementation.
The normative V11 Specialist Compiler contract.
The golden and adversarial specialist compiler tests.
The public V11 positioning and boundary.
The deterministic provider-neutral package renderer.
The closed provider-neutral specialist input schema.
The strict schema and provider-neutral boundary tests.
The active V11 product and acceptance contract.
The public specialist contract types.

forbiddenEffects: Do not access a network or provider.
Do not execute or dispatch runtime agents from core.
Do not merge or update durable memory before integration review.
Do not widen reviewed filesystem authority.

workUnits.objective: Integrate independent handoffs, update traceable V11 artifacts and memory, and prepare the milestone without merging.

module.action: Resolve review findings and assemble source-linked owner approval evidence.

stopConditions: Stop before merge; owner approval remains mandatory.
Stop if any independent review returns REVISE.

workUnits.objective: Confirm the reviewed product, algorithm, and security sources match their declared content digests before independent review.

module.action: Bind one immutable review candidate to exact source evidence.

stopConditions: Stop if any declared source digest or byte count does not match.

workUnits.objective: Independently determine whether construction, scheduling, selection, and digest semantics are deterministic, bounded, and honestly described.

module.action: Review candidate generation, hard gates, metrics, comparator, scheduling, and reproducibility.

contextUses.purpose: Review the normative search and objective contract.
Audit golden, exact-count, bounded, and permutation evidence.
Review metric and evaluation output types.

stopConditions: Stop with REVISE if bounded search is represented as a global optimum.
Stop with REVISE if selection can change under logical input permutation.

workUnits.objective: Independently determine whether V11 solves the owner goal with a clear, minimal, IDE-agnostic public contract.

module.action: Review product fit, public API closure, usability, and claimed boundaries.

contextUses.purpose: Review installed and provider-neutral schema evidence.
Review the additive public type surface.

stopConditions: Stop with REVISE if a generic role can substitute for exact task demand.
Stop with REVISE if the public contract requires a provider or runtime.

workUnits.objective: Independently determine whether authority, context, privacy, rendering, and trace bindings fail closed without claiming host enforcement.

module.action: Review schema closure, semantic authority, privacy, canonical digests, rendering containment, and host boundaries.

contextUses.purpose: Audit adversarial authority, privacy, and tamper coverage.
Audit tamper checks and payload bindings.

stopConditions: Stop with REVISE if a blueprint can widen owner authority.
Stop with REVISE if package tampering can retain the reviewed digest.

workUnits.objective: Independently verify the strict schema, specialist golden suite, full kernel gate, package dry run, installed consumer, and template checker evidence.

module.action: Re-run and inspect every canonical V11 release gate.

stopConditions: Stop with FIX if any canonical gate fails or cannot be reproduced.
